chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Bail Appln No.1997 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge For hearing of bail application 04.09.2025 Mr. Muneer Ahmed Gilal, Advocate for the applicant. None present for the complainant. Mr. Mohsin Mangi, APG Sindh. ------------------------------- Learned counsel for the applicant on instructions no longer wishes to press this bail application which is dismissed as not pressed. J U D G E Asif
